queries.question: In what month were the computers purchased?
queries.sql: SELECT Materials.Month FROM Materials WHERE Materials.ResourceType =  'Computers'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?month WHERE {
  ?materials a :Materials .
  ?materials p:Month ?month .
  ?materials p:ResourceType ?resourcetype_f .
  FILTER(STR(?resourcetype_f) = "Computers")
}

queries.question: Show me the resource type and supplier for all expenses by month and year
queries.sql: SELECT Expenses.Supplier, Materials.Month, Year FROM Expenses JOIN Materials ON Expenses.MaterialId = Materials.MaterialID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?supplier ?month ?year WHERE {
  ?expenses a :Expenses .
  ?materials a :Materials .
  ?expenses p:hasMaterials ?materials .
  ?expenses p:Supplier ?supplier .
  ?materials p:Month ?month .
  ?materials p:Year ?year .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: When were the computers purchased?
Who provided all the materials and when?
